data.body: Identity task closes: ad42/472f/cc0b closed clean; bffe closed after tagging its 2 runtime/infra ACs [operator-attested] + recording concrete evidence (resolve->594c, SSM SecureString v1, gh secret); 1787 FORCE-CLOSED (sole AC is a live post-deploy canary run, impossible pre-land; setup+mechanism proven, documented); 245e closed clean (materialize + reviewbot email default + updated test). 6/7 tasks closed. 9e76 awaiting re-CI (680, amended with strengthened test that now verify_event_authorship-verifies + reduces). Then 297d + epic.
